subject: Re: Sunday dinner?
body: Quick reply — will follow up properly tomorrow.\n\n— Kristy

subject: Re: Deposit for the ridge-line vessel
body: Helen - the certificate of authenticity is drafted, I'll finalize the provenance note and send with the vessel after the show. - Kristy

subject: Re: Vessel as Landscape - production timeline
body: Diane - attaching the weights spreadsheet, still double-checking the footprint on the two largest before I hit send.

subject: Re: Water Memory - two more sold and a question
body: Sarah - rough dates for the drought-series studio visit, maybe late winter. Will confirm once my kiln calendar clears.

subject: Re: Acquisition interest - Vessel as Landscape
body: Draft collection sheet - need to pull final images from the last firing before this goes out to the committee.

subject: Re: April newsletter draft for your eyes
body: Lena - one more thought, add a subscriber-only preview of Daniel's sculptures next month. Sleep on it and tell me if it's too soon.

subject: Re: That base crack you mentioned
body: Ray - want to send you photos of the patched foot once it's bisqued. Reminder to attach the before shots too.

subject: Re: Feature request - fall solo show
body: Notes for the interview - landscape sources: the arroyo behind the studio, ridgelines off I-25, the dry riverbeds near Hatch. Expand before sending.

subject: Re: Studio visit follow-up - representation
body: Daniel - draft representation terms, still confirming the commission split language with Lena before this is official.

subject: Re: Condition reports and insurance values
body: Paul - lift-point diagram half done, need to measure the shoulder girth on the 44-inch piece before I finalize.

subject: Re: Opening night run of show
body: Opening remarks draft - keep it under five minutes, thank Ray, the family, and the gallery team. Practice out loud first.

subject: Re: Acquisition confirmed - the large ridge vessel
body: Provenance note for the Garza piece - firing date, glaze recipe reference, exhibition history. Finish before Lena sends the invoice.

subject: Re: Your Blick order has shipped
body: Reminder to reorder wax resist and a fresh set of trimming tools next month for the workshop supplies.

subject: Re: Kiln schedule this week + big coil piece
body: Marcus - cone pack log template attached, fill this in for every museum-piece firing so we have a record. Tidy up wording.

subject: Re: Bosque wants to borrow one of your early vessels
body: Note to self - photograph the gray 2022 vessel for the Bosque loan file before it leaves the studio.

subject: Re: Albuquerque Journal - local artist feature
body: Teresa - list of represented artists who might say a few words: Sarah, Daniel, maybe Rosa if she's back from Taos. Confirm availability.

subject: Re: Interested in the small arroyo bowl set
body: Card text for Margaret's bowls - local stoneware, wood-ash glaze, hand-coiled. Write something warmer before printing.

subject: Re: Water Memory closing plans
body: Deinstall checklist - wrap order, condition photos on removal, separate crate for the two northbound panels. Expand into a real list.

subject: Re: Planning the spring slate
body: Spring calendar draft - March Daniel debut, April light, May two-person clay show. Sanity-check against my studio load.

subject: Re: After the opening, let's disappear for a few days
body: Packing list for Taos - no laptop, one sketchbook only (cheating, I know). Delete the sketchbook line before Sofia sees this.
